task_completion.description: Cancel or delete pending purchase orders from the disrupted vendor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Purchase Orders list view, orders from 'Precision Aeroparts Inc.' should be marked as 'Cancelled' or no longer present.

task_completion.description: Create confirmed purchase orders to SkyTech Components Ltd. for the correct products and quantities.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing confirmed Purchase Orders to 'SkyTech Components Ltd.' containing products AERO-BRK-001 (qty 25) and AERO-HYD-002 (qty 40).

task_completion.description: Create confirmed purchase orders to AeroAlloy Materials Corp. for the correct products and quantities.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing confirmed Purchase Orders to 'AeroAlloy Materials Corp.' containing products AERO-TRB-003 (qty 15) and AERO-FAS-004 (qty 100).

task_completion.description: Update automated reorder rules/vendor pricelists for SkyTech products.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Product form (Purchase tab) or Reordering Rules for AERO-BRK-001 and AERO-HYD-002 showing 'SkyTech Components Ltd.' as the configured vendor.

task_completion.description: Update automated reorder rules/vendor pricelists for AeroAlloy products.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Product form (Purchase tab) or Reordering Rules for AERO-TRB-003 and AERO-FAS-004 showing 'AeroAlloy Materials Corp.' as the configured vendor.

task_completion.description: Ensure protected purchase orders remain intact and unaffected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Purchase Orders list view, active purchase orders containing products AERO-CMP-006 and AERO-SEL-009 should still be present and not cancelled.

integrity.description: The agent used the Odoo web interface to perform actions.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Odoo web UI being navigated and forms being filled out, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent manually entered or selected the correct vendors and quantities.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show dropdown selections and quantity inputs in the Odoo interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the UI state.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are visible in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Disrupted vendor: Precision Aeroparts Inc. Affected products and original quantities: AERO-BRK-001 (qty 25), AERO-HYD-002 (qty 40), AERO-TRB-003 (qty 15), AERO-FAS-004 (qty 100). Backup vendors: SkyTech Components Ltd. (for AERO-BRK-001, AERO-HYD-002) and AeroAlloy Materials Corp. (for AERO-TRB-003, AERO-FAS-004). Protected products that must not be altered: AERO-CMP-006, AERO-SEL-009.
